# CoreMark

> CoreMark produces original topic-wise practice booklets for the Cambridge Lower Secondary curriculum, Stage 7 to 9, covering Mathematics, Science and Computing. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Cambridge Assessment International Education.

## What CoreMark Is

CoreMark sells downloadable PDF practice packs for students following the Cambridge Lower Secondary programme (Stage 7, 8 and 9). Each pack covers one topic only and includes: a cheat sheet of key rules and formulas, 20 questions graded Foundation / Standard / Stretch, full step-by-step worked solutions that explain the reasoning and flag the common mistake, and a parent/tutor guide. Packs are priced at ₹249 per topic or ₹2,499 for all three subjects. Instant download on purchase. 7-day money-back guarantee.

## Subjects Covered

- Mathematics (Stage 7, 8, 9): Number, Algebra, Geometry, Statistics, Ratio and Proportion, and more
- Science (Stage 7, 8, 9): Biology, Chemistry, Physics topics including Forces, Energy, Photosynthesis, Chemical Reactions, and more
- Computing (Stage 7, 8, 9): Programming, Pseudocode, Flowcharts, Databases, Networks, Computer Systems, and more

## Who It Is For

Parents and tutors of students aged 11–14 who follow the Cambridge Lower Secondary curriculum at international schools, primarily in India and South Asia. CoreMark is not a tuition platform — it is a printable practice resource for home and tutor use.

## Priority Pages

- [Home](https://coremark.study/): CoreMark — topic-wise practice boosters for Cambridge Lower Secondary
- [Mathematics Boosters](https://coremark.study/math.html): Stage 7, 8 and 9 Maths topic packs
- [Science Boosters](https://coremark.study/science.html): Stage 7, 8 and 9 Science topic packs
- [Computing Boosters](https://coremark.study/computing.html): Stage 7, 8 and 9 Computing topic packs
- [Blog](https://coremark.study/blog/): Parent guides and subject explainers for Cambridge Lower Secondary

## Key Blog Posts

- [Cambridge Checkpoint Explained](https://coremark.study/blog/cambridge-checkpoint-explained-parent-guide.html): What the Cambridge Lower Secondary Checkpoint is and how it works
- [Cambridge Lower Secondary Stages Explained](https://coremark.study/blog/cambridge-lower-secondary-stages-explained.html): What Stage 7, 8 and 9 mean
- [Past Papers vs Topic Boosters](https://coremark.study/blog/cambridge-checkpoint-past-papers-vs-topic-boosters.html): How to choose the right practice method
- [Cambridge Maths Topics That Cost Marks](https://coremark.study/blog/cambridge-maths-topics-that-cost-marks.html): The highest-value topics to focus revision on

## Pricing

- Single booster: ₹249
- Any 5 boosters: ₹799
- Full subject (all topics, one subject): ₹1,299
- All three subjects: ₹2,499
- 7-day money-back guarantee on all purchases
